title: Peaceful Night's Rest
description: Sleep in a bed to instantly skip the night without requiring all players. A simple quality-of-life improvement for multiplayer servers.
body:
# 🌙 Peaceful Night's Rest

**Skip the night solo—no more waiting for everyone to sleep!**

Transform your multiplayer Minecraft experience with this lightweight datapack that lets **any single player** instantly skip to dawn by sleeping in a bed. No more coordinating bedtimes or dealing with phantom-filled nights while your friends are deep underground mining.

## ✨ Features

- **Instant night skip** — One player sleeping = immediate dawn
- **Zero performance impact** — Only activates when actually sleeping
- **Automatic mob clearing** — Hostile creatures vanish with the night
- **No configuration required** — Install and play immediately
- **Ultra-lightweight** — Minimal commands, maximum efficiency

Perfect for servers, realms, and co-op worlds where players are scattered across different activities. Whether you're building on the surface while friends explore caves, or just tired of zombie-dodging solo—this datapack has you covered.

*Simple. Efficient. Essential.*
